# Product Vision

Aurora is not appointment software.

Aurora is a Growth Operating System.

Mission:
- Save Time
- Make Money
- Reduce Stress

Target Customers:
- Salons
- Dermatologists
- Aesthetic Clinics
- Dentists (future)

Problems:
- Paper diary
- Manual booking
- Walk-ins
- No-shows
- Empty weekday slots
- Reception overload
- Weak follow-up
- Poor analytics

Solution:
Beautiful software + AI + WhatsApp automation + online booking.
